title: echinocereus stramineus subsp. occidentalis
intro: Echinocereus stramineus subsp. occidentalis, also known as the Western Striated Hedgehog Cactus, is a type of cactus plant that belongs to the Echinocereus genus, characterized by its distinctive striped stems and vibrant flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory abilities, which have been used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Echinocereus stramineus subsp. occidentalis include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to protect against certain infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into tinctures, infusions, or creams, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
